title: koenigia alpina var. alpina
intro: Koenigia alpina var. alpina, also known as Indian knotweed or Himalayan knotweed, is a plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koenigia alpina var. alpina include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
